hexcasting.category.hexxyspells:main_cat: A system of weaving environmental elements with the mathematical precision of hexes. THIS IS ALPHA!  (I was use LLM to translate. Don't trust this book)
hexcasting.category.hexxyspells:elements: Patterns used to attune your inner focus to a specific energy type. Modifies subsequent spell behaviors.
hexcasting.category.hexxyspells:weaving_: Methods of projecting your will into the physical world. Forms stable constructs and flying hexagonal matrices.
hexcasting.category.hexxyspells:spells_s: Universal matrices that direct the active element into a physical manifestation.
hexcasting.page.hexxyspells:schoolspirit: Attunes focus to Spirit energy. Changes subsequent spell forms to the Spirit element.$(br2)Cost: 0 Media
hexcasting.page.hexxyspells:schoolfire.d: Attunes focus to Fire energy. Changes subsequent spell forms to the Fire element.$(br2)Cost: 0 Media
Attunes focus to Water energy. Changes subsequent spell forms to the Water element.$(br2)Cost: 0 Media
Attunes focus to Earth energy. Changes subsequent spell forms to the Earth element.$(br2)Cost: 0 Media
hexcasting.page.hexxyspells:schoolair.de: Attunes focus to Air energy. Changes subsequent spell forms to the Air element.$(br2)Cost: 0 Media
hexcasting.page.hexxyspells:schooldark.d: Attunes focus to Dark energy. Changes subsequent spell forms to the Dark element. Deals 1.5 times more damage. They say those who use the Dark gradually go insane... (WIP)$(br2)Cost: 0 Media
hexcasting.page.hexxyspells:spawn_flying: Releases a flying hexagonal matrix into the world. $(br2)Accepts from stack: $(br)• Pattern List (LIST)$(br2)Cost: 3 Media Dust
hexcasting.page.hexxyspells:projectile.d: Shapes a directed bolt of the active element. Deals damage equal to power. • Cost: Half of the power squared
Triggers an instantaneous energy release at specific coordinates. Deals damage equal to power. • Cost: Half of the power squared
hexcasting.page.hexxyspells:continuousac: A channeled beam or cone in the look direction. Deals damage equal to power.  • Cost: Half of the power squared
hexcasting.page.hexxyspells:instantactio: Manifests the spell through an instantaneous summoning of a magical object or minion at the target position. Deals damage equal to power. • Cost: Half of the power squared
